chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR C. P No. D – 386 of 2025 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge Fresh case 1. For orders on office objection at flag ‘A’ 2. For orders on CMA No.1774/2025 (Ex.A) 3. For orders on CMA No.1775/2025 (S/A) 4. For hearing of main case 18.04.2025 None present for the petitioners nor any intimation received. On the last date of hearing Counsel for the petitioners was directed to produce the petitoners before this Court. Today neither petitioners nor their Counsel are in attendance. The absence on the part of the petitioners and their Counsel prima facie suggests that either the purpose of filing instant Petition has been served or they have lost interest in pursuing the same. Accordingly, the Petition is dismissed for non-prosecution along with listed applications. Judge Judge ARBROHI
